examples: The ribbons are narrow enough to have an electronic bandgap and thus switching properties.
One way of introducing a bandgap into graphene is to make extremely narrow ribbons of the material.
A bandgap voltage reference circuit with good stability and high accuracy is designed in this pa - per.
Its physical properties (its narrow bandgap, in physics parlance) mean that it sometimes releases electrons even though no light has fallen on it, resulting in a noisy image.
